Heartstrings Club

Before signup

Read the terms and conditions before creating your account.

This standalone page is still available if you want to review the agreement outside the signup popup.

Account gate

The same content also appears as a blocking popup directly on the signup page before the form becomes interactive.

Responsive flow

The terms area is sized for mobile and desktop, with smooth scrolling and a locked action until the end is reached.

Terms and conditions

Heartstrings Club V1 Agreement

Scroll to the bottom to unlock the accept button.

Using Heartstrings Club

Heartstrings Club is designed as a gentle self-support platform for journaling, reflection, and private emotional check-ins. It is not a replacement for licensed medical, legal, or emergency services.

Privacy expectations

We work to keep your account content private to your authenticated session and stored data. You are responsible for protecting your login credentials and for using a device you trust.

Emotional safety

The platform may discuss grief, heartbreak, and difficult emotions. If you feel in immediate danger or at risk of harming yourself or someone else, stop using the platform and contact emergency or crisis services right away.

Acceptable use

You agree not to misuse the platform, attempt unauthorized access, interfere with service availability, or submit content that breaks applicable law or violates another person's privacy or safety.

Account responsibilities

You are responsible for the accuracy of your signup information, maintaining your password securely, and any activity that occurs through your account until you notify us of misuse.

Letters and diary entries

Diary entries and personal letters are intended for your own private use. Once a letter is marked completed, the current V1 design treats it as sealed content and stops returning its text through the UI and API.

Future updates

We may improve features, privacy controls, and safety mechanisms in later versions. Continued use after material updates may require reviewing a newer terms version before certain actions such as signup.

Acceptance

Accepting sets a short-lived server cookie that unlocks signup and lets the backend verify that this step was completed first.

Still here when you need it

© 2026 Heartstrings Club

A warm digital sanctuary for reflection, support, and healing. Like a room you can return to after dark.
